overall.description: A smooth aerial drone shot sweeps across an ancient Mediterranean city at golden hour, revealing classical stone architecture, terracotta rooftops, and a monumental white lighthouse in the distance. The video game footage showcases a coastal urban environment with a central bridge over a waterway, transitioning from a hilltop temple district to the seafront.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient hillside residential district with monumental temple

agents.ego_description: aerial drone camera slowly panning right across the ancient cityscape, surveying the terracotta rooftops and hilltop temple

entered.detail: classical temple with green copper dome atop a fortified hill on the left side of the frame
tall white monumental tower resembling the Lighthouse of Alexandria, visible in the distant background
cluster of ancient Mediterranean buildings with red terracotta roofs and stone walls
large stone bridge with multiple arches spanning the urban waterway
waterway running through the center of the city, reflecting the golden hour light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of an ancient Mediterranean city bathed in golden hour light. A prominent hilltop temple with a green dome dominates the left side, while a tall white lighthouse stands in the distant center. The camera slowly pans right over terracotta rooftops and a stone bridge crossing the central waterway.

scene_state.functional_zone: central urban canal with monumental bridge crossing

events.description: camera continues panning right bringing the stone arch bridge into central focus while the hilltop temple exits the frame

agents.ego_description: drone maintains steady altitude while panning right to reveal the central bridge structure and columned buildings

entered.detail: ancient temple or public building with prominent stone columns and triangular pediment
dense cluster of buildings approaching the coastline on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans right, the hilltop temple exits the frame left while the stone bridge moves to center stage. A classical columned building appears on the right, and the white lighthouse shifts toward the left background. The urban canal remains visible below as the view opens toward the coastal district.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal harbor district with sea view and construction site

events.description: sea horizon becomes visible on the right, revealing the coastal edge of the ancient city

agents.ego_description: drone continues panning right to reveal the coastline and harbor construction area

entered.detail: calm Mediterranean sea visible on the horizon with soft blue tones
wooden scaffolding and construction materials along the waterfront, indicating active building or renovation
cluster of palm trees lining the coastal district

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the coastal edge of the city as the sea horizon appears on the right. A harbor construction site with wooden scaffolding occupies the lower right, while palm trees line the waterfront. The stone bridge has now moved to the left side of the frame, and the white lighthouse remains visible in the distant center background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial sweep across an ancient Mediterranean city, transitioning from a hilltop temple district toward the open coastal horizon. It begins with a view of a green-domed temple and a distant white lighthouse, panning right over a sea of terracotta rooftops and a stone bridge crossing a central waterway. As the camera continues its rightward motion, the temple exits the frame to make room for a classical columned building, shifting the lighthouse toward the left background as the urban canal opens up. The scene then expands to reveal the city's edge, where the sea horizon emerges on the right alongside palm trees and a harbor construction site with wooden scaffolding. Finally, the stone bridge moves to the left of the frame while the white lighthouse remains a steady anchor in the distant center background.
